name: How to survive as the Villainess
description:
𝚂𝚎𝚡𝚢 𝚓𝚞𝚝𝚜𝚞~𝙍𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨𝙚 𝙃𝙖𝙧𝙚𝙢 𝙅𝙪𝙩𝙨𝙪!

♡

★

♡

Summary: Getting isekaied to a otome game is fun… if you’re the heroine. You’re the villain unfortunately and currently getting dumped by the crown prince. Now start your own harem (or just have fun) with some side characters that are way hotter than the original male leads.

Your male leads that weren’t in the original game in order of the thumbnail. If you want to see more, you can read the description.

^^River valera, the emotionless duke known as the dog of the empire, can you tame him?(River’s bot)^^

^^Aster Roid, the owner of the magic tower with a secret (aster’s bot)^^

^^Juniper Fawn, the human hating Demi-human merchant (Juniper’s bot)^^

^^Cedric, your commoner knight who’s more loyal than you can imagine (Cedric’s bot)^^

I’ll probably make more bots for them individually bc I’m OBSESSED WITH THE PICS I HAVE

Heavily inspired by the bots:

﻿﻿"Reincarnated As The Villainess" by
Mrshmellow

﻿﻿"Isekai As A Villainess" by Violetzzx

They're such talented creators and i absolutely LOVE their bots (especially these rpgs)!
creator: Icantdothisanymore69
